title: rostellularia hayatae
intro: Rostellularia hayatae, also known as Taiwan Mountain Mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is native to Taiwan and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rostellularia hayatae include reducing fever, relieving headaches and digestive issues, and treating respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Herbal preparations of Rostellularia hayatae typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, or using the essential oil in aromatherapy or topical applications.
